name: REASON Ontology (MECE, Logic Trees, Hypothesis-Driven Analysis)
description: AI agent reasoning substrate: MECE decomposition, Logic Trees, Hypothesis-Driven Strategy, Evidence Chains, and Analysis Synthesis. Provides structured reasoning patterns enabling Gen AI agents to perform rigorous strategic analysis with anti-confirmation-bias safeguards. Part of VE-Series VSOM-SA sub-series.

components.StrategicQuestion: Root question driving an analysis tree
components.MECEBranch: Individual branch with assigned framework for parallel routing
components.StrategicHypothesis: Testable strategic hypothesis with evidence requirements
components.EvidenceItem: Evidence for/against a hypothesis with direction and strength
components.LogicTreeNode: Node with sensitivity rank identifying highest-impact levers
components.StrategicRecommendation: Actionable recommendation with confidence and dependencies

crossOntology.name: branchAssignsFramework
crossOntology.purpose: MECE branches route to specific analysis frameworks

crossOntology.name: recommendationInformsStrategy
crossOntology.purpose: Recommendations feed back into VSOM strategy

versionHistory.changes: Initial release — MECE, Logic Trees, Hypothesis-Driven Analysis, Synthesis, anti-confirmation-bias rules

notes: Layer 4 (Reasoning) of VSOM Strategy Analysis. AI agent reasoning substrate. MECEBranch.assignedFramework enables parallel framework routing. Anti-confirmation-bias rules BR-RSN-007/008.
